integration_validation_v2.evidence: src/self_improve/scheduler.rs:149-204 real rolling-window cap + deterministic skip-reason priority (operator>goodhart>pending>budget); inline+integration tests prove 25/24h cap and true sliding window. CONCERN: scheduler doc (scheduler.rs:147-148) says it is the 'only caller of LoopCore::run_one_iteration' yet run_one_iteration has zero non-test callers in src/ — the scheduler is orphaned, and FR-EVT-DISTILL-LOOP-CAP is only returned as a struct, never emitted to a real EventLedger.

minimum_controls: Use contract-first identity and preserve projection hash.
risks: Imported MT contract may under-capture prose-only review or proof instructions.
